<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate-config.mjs from config/widget-config.mjs. Do not edit. -->

# Configuration reference

Every integration exposes the same options of `window.AccessibilityWidgetConfig`,
generated from [`config/widget-config.mjs`](../config/widget-config.mjs). Labels and
help are shipped in **English and German**; each admin UI renders in its own language.

**Flattened admin settings → runtime shape:**

- `offsetX` / `offsetY` → `offset: { x, y }`
- per-feature tri-state `feature_<id>` (`default|on|off|disabled`) → `initialFeatures` + `disabledFeatures`
  (Shopify and TYPO3 use two compact comma-separated fields instead, within their platform limits)
- `assetBase` derives `corePath` / `cssPath` unless those are set explicitly (Advanced)

## Appearance — Darstellung

| Key | Type | Default | Description (EN) | Beschreibung (DE) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `position` | enum | `bottom-right` | Where the floating button appears. | Wo die Schaltfläche erscheint. |
| `offsetX` | int | `20` | Distance from the screen edge. | Abstand zum Bildschirmrand. |
| `offsetY` | int | `20` | Distance from the screen edge. | Abstand zum Bildschirmrand. |
| `zIndex` | int | `2147483646` | Stacking order of the widget. Increase if it sits behind other elements. | Stapelreihenfolge des Widgets. Erhöhen, falls es hinter anderen Elementen liegt. |
| `primaryColor` | color | `#0058a3` | Color of the floating button. | Farbe der Schaltfläche. |
| `locale` | enum | `auto` | Widget UI language. "Auto" detects the browser/page language. | Sprache der Widget-Oberfläche. „Auto“ erkennt die Browser-/Seitensprache. |
| `buttonLabel` | string | — | Accessible label for the button. Empty uses the localized default. | Barrierefreie Beschriftung der Schaltfläche. Leer = lokalisierter Standard. |

## Behavior — Verhalten

| Key | Type | Default | Description (EN) | Beschreibung (DE) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `draggableFab` | bool | `false` | Let visitors drag the button to reposition it. | Besucher können die Schaltfläche verschieben. |
| `respectReducedMotion` | bool | `true` | Honor the visitor's prefers-reduced-motion setting. | Die Einstellung „prefers-reduced-motion“ des Besuchers berücksichtigen. |
| `hideOnPrint` | bool | `true` | Hide the widget on printed pages. | Widget in der Druckansicht ausblenden. |
| `keyboardShortcut` | string | `ctrl+alt+a` | Shortcut to open the widget (e.g. ctrl+alt+a). Empty disables it. | Tastenkürzel zum Öffnen (z. B. ctrl+alt+a). Leer = deaktiviert. |
| `storageKey` | string | `accessibility-widget` | localStorage key for saved visitor preferences. Change only to avoid conflicts. | localStorage-Schlüssel für gespeicherte Einstellungen. Nur bei Konflikten ändern. |
| `hidePoweredBy` | bool | `false` | Hide the provider credit in the widget panel. | Den Anbieter-Hinweis im Widget ausblenden. |
| `debug` | bool | `false` | Log diagnostic messages to the browser console. | Diagnosemeldungen in der Browser-Konsole ausgeben. |

## Content — Inhalt

| Key | Type | Default | Description (EN) | Beschreibung (DE) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `statementUrl` | url | — | Link to your accessibility statement. | Link zu Ihrer Barrierefreiheitserklärung. |
| `disclaimer` | string | — | Short note shown in the widget panel. | Kurzer Hinweis im Widget-Panel. |

## Features — Funktionen

| Key | Type | Default | Description (EN) | Beschreibung (DE) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `feature_fontSize` | tri-state | `default` | Font size | Schriftgröße |
| `feature_lineHeight` | tri-state | `default` | Line height | Zeilenhöhe |
| `feature_letterSpacing` | tri-state | `default` | Letter spacing | Buchstabenabstand |
| `feature_contrast` | tri-state | `default` | Contrast | Kontrast |
| `feature_grayscale` | tri-state | `default` | Grayscale | Graustufen |
| `feature_invertColors` | tri-state | `default` | Invert colors | Farben invertieren |
| `feature_dyslexiaFont` | tri-state | `default` | Dyslexia font | Dyslexie-Schrift |
| `feature_highlightLinks` | tri-state | `default` | Highlight links | Links hervorheben |
| `feature_pauseAnimations` | tri-state | `default` | Pause animations | Animationen pausieren |
| `feature_bigCursor` | tri-state | `default` | Big cursor | Großer Mauszeiger |
| `feature_focusOutline` | tri-state | `default` | Focus outline | Fokus-Umrandung |
| `feature_readingMask` | tri-state | `default` | Reading mask | Lesemaske |
| `feature_readingGuide` | tri-state | `default` | Reading guide | Leselineal |
| `feature_tts` | tri-state | `default` | Text to speech | Vorlesefunktion |
| `feature_structureNav` | tri-state | `default` | Structure navigation | Struktur-Navigation |

## Advanced / self-hosting — Erweitert / Self-Hosting

| Key | Type | Default | Description (EN) | Beschreibung (DE) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `assetBase` | url | — | Empty loads from the BAUER GROUP CDN (recommended, always current). Set only to self-host/mirror. | Leer = Laden vom BAUER GROUP CDN (empfohlen, immer aktuell). Nur zum Self-Hosting/Spiegeln setzen. |
| `corePath` | url | — | Overrides the derived core bundle URL. Advanced self-hosting only. | Überschreibt die abgeleitete Core-Bundle-URL. Nur für fortgeschrittenes Self-Hosting. |
| `cssPath` | url | — | Overrides the derived stylesheet URL. Advanced self-hosting only. | Überschreibt die abgeleitete Stylesheet-URL. Nur für fortgeschrittenes Self-Hosting. |
| `coreIntegrity` | string | — | Subresource Integrity hash for a pinned core URL. Only with a fixed self-hosted version. | Subresource-Integrity-Hash für eine gepinnte Core-URL. Nur mit fester, selbst gehosteter Version. |
| `cssIntegrity` | string | — | Subresource Integrity hash for a pinned stylesheet URL. | Subresource-Integrity-Hash für eine gepinnte Stylesheet-URL. |
